name: aggproj_headselect_exp037
hypothesis: Is head SELECTION the lever? exp036 found ~5/16 frozen-dense heads induce but _agg_proj (TRAINABLE, sees all 16 heads) dilutes them. _agg_proj already has capacity to up-weight inducing heads, so a per-head GATE would be redundant. This tests H2 (signal too weak to drive _agg_proj) vs H1 (CE never exploits it): zero _agg_proj's weights for half the heads at init (force the aggregation through 8 heads only). If recall>0 -> head selection matters, the restricted path lets CE find induction (editable). If 0.29/0.0 -> CE doesn't exploit even a head-restricted path -> loss-side ceiling, handoff airtight. Init-time mask (recurrence math unchanged -> parity OK). Direct comparison to exp001 (all 16 heads, 0.296/0.0).
